nasb.text: The field is ruined, The land mourns; For the grain is ruined, The new wine dries up, Fresh oil fails.

esv.text: The fields are destroyed, the ground mourns, because the grain is destroyed, the wine dries up, the oil languishes.

cnv.text: 田野荒廢， 土地淒涼， 因為五穀毀壞， 新酒乾竭， 油也缺乏。

ccb.text: 田园荒废，遍地凄凉， 五谷尽毁， 再也没有新酒和油了。
